demos.name: static_square
demos.description: Four objects stay near the four speaker quadrants for basic localization checks.

demos.name: front_focus
demos.description: All objects stay near the front stage for vocal-center playback checks.

demos.name: orbit_motion
demos.description: Objects move on the four-speaker plane for automation and interpolation checks.

demos.name: call_response
demos.description: Objects move in left-right and front-back call-response patterns.
